note: Both projects embed the same compiled design system _ds/imladris-design-system-89e0d236 (React IIFE -> window.ImladrisDesignSystem_89e0d2). The canvases are real, copyable HTML mockups; the component bundle is compiled React (not consumable by the vanilla-PHP / strict-CSP target) and is NOT vendored. Implementation is a translation of the canvas DESIGN into RetroBoards' existing server-rendered templates + theming system, not a copy.

designSystem.name: Imladris
designSystem.register: Rivendell-inspired: parchment-and-evergreen surfaces, single mallorn-gold accent, eight-pointed elven star mark; lyrical serif typography (Cormorant Garamond display, Marcellus labels, EB Garamond body, JetBrains Mono data)
designSystem.fontsRemote: Google Fonts CDN (Cormorant Garamond / Marcellus / EB Garamond / JetBrains Mono) — self-host for the strict-CSP target

projects.name: Forum software implementation
projects.purpose: Desktop three-pane 'Community Inbox' forum shell (general-purpose boards), Imladris-skinned

projects.name: Imladris Council Forum Design
projects.purpose: Mobile counterpart: 6 iOS frames — Council Inbox, Navigation drawer, Thread & reply, New topic, Guest read-only, Top contributors

layers.css: styles.css + tokens/*.css available remotely; values known
layers.components: compiled React bundle — NOT vendored (incompatible target)

cache: .design-pull/.cache/ (gitignored): Hall of Fire.dc.html, RetroBoards.dc.html, RetroBoards Mobile.dc.html
